dataset_metadata.description: Knowledge base para JARVIS Acadêmico com cobertura de IA, Árvores de Decisão, ML e Embeddings

sources: Russel & Norvig - Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach (3rd Ed)

arvores_decisao.description: TDIDT, entropia, ganho de informação, poda, GINI
sources: Quinlan - C4.5: Programs for Machine Learning
Breiman et al - Classification and Regression Trees (CART)
Tan et al - Introduction to Data Mining
Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman - Elements of Statistical Learning

embeddings_rag.description: Representações vetoriais, embeddings, RAG, busca semântica
sources: Bengio et al - Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe)
Sentence-BERT: Sentence Embeddings using Siamese BERT-Networks

avaliacao_testes.description: Metodologia de avaliação, explicabilidade, robustez, testes adversariais
sources: Ribeiro, Singh, Guestrin - 'Why Should I Trust You?': Explaining the Predictions of Any Classifier (LIME)
Goodfellow et al - Explaining and Harnessing Adversarial Examples

limitations.retrieval_method: TF-based with manual keywords (not semantic embeddings)
limitations.coverage: Limited to core ML/IA topics; missing SVM, Naive Bayes, other algorithms
limitations.scalability: Suitable for MVP; would need vector DB for production
limitations.language: Portuguese only; multilingual support not implemented
limitations.updating: Manual chunk addition; no automatic web scraping
limitations.evaluation: Keyword matching is simplistic; would benefit from more sophisticated evaluation

usage_examples.query: Explique entropia em árvores de decisão
usage_examples.expected_answer: Entropia mede desordem/impureza. TDIDT seleciona atributo com ganho máximo para purificar partições.
